rules.name: Jest test failure
rules.suggestion: One or more tests failed. Check the test output for assertion details and fix the failing expectations.

rules.name: Test timeout
rules.pattern: Timeout.*exceeded|exceeded timeout|Async callback was not invoked within
rules.suggestion: Test timed out — likely an async operation that never resolves. Check for missing await, unresolved promises, or network calls in tests.

rules.name: Snapshot mismatch
rules.pattern: Snapshot.*mismatch|toMatchSnapshot|Received value does not match stored snapshot
rules.suggestion: Snapshot test failed. If the change is intentional, run `jest --updateSnapshot` to update.

rules.name: Import/module error in tests
rules.suggestion: Module resolution failed in test context. Check jest.config moduleNameMapper, transformIgnorePatterns for react-native packages.

rules.name: TypeScript type error in tests
rules.pattern: TS\d{4}:|Type '.*' is not assignable|Property '.*' does not exist
rules.suggestion: TypeScript type error. Fix the type mismatch or update the type definitions.
